headline: NRG Energy (NRG) Nears Completion of First TEF-Backed 415-MW Gas Expansion in Houston
summary: NRG Energy Inc. (NYSE:NRG) is one of the best NYSE stocks to buy according to Wall Street analysts. On May 7, NRG Energy is nearing the completion of a 415-MW gas capacity addition at its TH Wharton plant in Houston, scheduled for later this month.
